SELECT TO_CHAR(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_date), 'FM9999') || '-' || TO_CHAR(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM order_date), 'FM00') AS month 
FROM orders 
GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_date), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM order_date) 
ORDER BY SUM(amount

SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN is_fraud THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 4) 
FROM orders 
WHERE order_date >= '2025-02-01' AND order_date < '2025-03-01'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM customers) AND customer_id IS NOT NULL
